The already working AI Doctor can detect crucial vitals and multiple non-communicable diseases (NCDs) – such as heart attacks, diabetes, high blood pressure, and strokes – at their earliest stages.

Saving

The World With AI

Current Global Problem

4,100,000,000 people

worldwide lack access to basic healthcare services.

Our Solution

AI – Hyper-personalized AI Doctor (EWS).

DePIN – Integrates Web2 & Web3 infrastructure.

DeSci – Gamifies the Healthcare Ecosystem.

What is BitDoctor.ai

A decentralized data infrastructure for the healthcare industry, where health data collected powers a hyper-personalised AI Doctor and supports parties needing large-scale health data, including AI agents in the medical space.

Shape the Future of Healthcare

Health data is highly valuable. But it's often tightly controlled by centralized entities demanding steep access fees. BitDoctor collects health data to advance medical research, unlock insights, innovate, and improve global healthcare outcomes.

Revolutionize Healthcare for Billions

BitDoctor taps into the power of over 6.8 billion smartphone users to democratize access to preventive healthcare. Help expand the reach of early detection tools that save lives across the globe.

Extend Life with AI Innovation

Advance healthcare that detects diseases early and contributes to longer, healthier lives. Your data contribution empowers individuals to take control of their health before conditions worsen.

Be A DePIN Pioneer

BitDoctor integrates blockchain technology to create a decentralized, patient-driven health network. By sharing your data, you shape a medical economy where people own and manage their health data securely.

Support UHC & UBI Principles

BitDoctor is committed to the principles of Universal Health Coverage (UHC) and Universal Basic Income (UBI). Play a part in reducing global healthcare inequality with BitDoctor.

Preventive Care Saves Lives

Our AI-driven system detects health risks up to 6 months in advance to allow early intervention. Participate in BitDoctor to save more lives with timely healthcare guidance for billions worldwide.

Why BitDoctor?

Healthcare Revolution
